evals.name: trigger-design-routing
evals.prompt: Should the design agent or the vue agent restyle the login card?

assertions.text: Explains the routing: visual/SCSS/layout/Vuetify theming work goes to the design agent, component logic/composables/stores go to the vue agent

evals.name: trigger-mixed-task-split
evals.prompt: Build a new analytics widget with a chart and live data fetching

assertions.text: Splits the work: design agent for the visual/layout/responsive parts, vue agent for the data fetching composable and logic, with handoff between them

evals.name: negative-pure-logic
evals.prompt: Write a Pinia store for cart state

assertions.text: Does NOT trigger design routing; pure state/logic work goes directly to the vue agent
